song.title: I Have a Dream
song.lyrics:
[V1] I have a dream, a song to sing To help me cope with anything When you see the wonder of this mystery tale, You can take the future, even if you fail.
[V2] I believe in Jesus Treasure hidden, lost within the field I believe in Jesus Savior, God-Man person now revealed I’ve found the stream, I have a dream
[V3] I have a dream, it’s Jesus Christ A hope made clear, more dear than life And the present struggle makes it worth the while, Pushing through the darkness still another mile.
[V4] I believe in Jesus Savior, Healer, Comforter and friend I believe in Jesus Salve for every broken heart to mend I’ve touched the stream, I have a dream
[V5] I’ve found the pearl, the merchant sought Into the His church I’ve now been brought And I’ve found the wonder of this mystery tale Hidden in the oyster safe from all travail.
[V6] I believe in Jesus Mystery hid from all until this age I believe in Jesus Emmanuel in every sacred page I’m in the stream, I live a dream
I’m in the stream, I live a dream
I’m in the stream I live a dream I’m in the stream I live a dream
[V7] I believe in Jesus Mystery hid from all until this age I believe in Jesus Emmanuel in every sacred page. I’m in the stream, I live a dream And mingled now this song we sing.
